name: 龍槌閃
description: 选择5格内一名敌人，瞬间冲到其相邻格并造成100%攻击力的物理伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; var target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 5, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) return target; var targetPiece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.instanceId === target.instanceId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!targetPiece) return { success: false, message: '目标不存在' }; var dirs = [{x:0,y:-1},{x:1,y:0},{x:0,y:1},{x:-1,y:0}]; for (var d = dirs.length - 1; d > 0; d--) { var j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (d + 1)); var tmp = dirs[d]; dirs[d] = dirs[j]; dirs[j] = tmp; } var landCell = null; for (var i = 0; i < dirs.length; i++) { var nx = targetPiece.x + dirs[i].x; var ny = targetPiece.y + dirs[i].y; var tile = battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === nx && t.y === ny; }); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) continue; var blocked = battle.pieces.some(function(p) { return p.x === nx && p.y === ny && p.currentHp > 0 && p.instanceId !== caster.instanceId; }); if (!blocked) { landCell = { x: nx, y: ny }; break; } } if (!landCell) return { success: false, message: '目标周围没有可落脚的位置' }; caster.x = landCell.x; caster.y = landCell.y; var dmgResult = dealDamage(caster, targetPiece, Math.floor(caster.attack * 1), 'physical', battle, 'kenshin-ryutsuisen'); var dmg = dmgResult.totalDamage !== undefined ? dmgResult.totalDamage : (dmgResult.damage || 0); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '龍槌閃！突进至' + targetPiece.name + '身边，造成' + dmg + '点伤害' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { var dmg = Math.max(1, Math.floor(piece.attack * skillDef.powerMultiplier)); return { description: '冲向5格内敌人，传送至其相邻格造成' + dmg + '（100%攻击力）点物理伤害', expectedValues: { damage: dmg } }; }
